title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Declaration of Townships Order
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Declaration of Townships Order

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Declaration of Townships Order.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these Regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Declaration of townships
provisions.content:
2. Declaration of townships
The places specified in the Schedule are declared to be townships.
